title: AssertionJudgeVerdicts
description: Output of the Stage-3 assertion-intent judge (Step 8, shadow mode). One verdict per generated test function: does its assertion set logically verify a derivative of the test title + the methods it calls, pinned to the Step-4 oracle?

test.description: Test function name (or file::name) this verdict is about.

verifies_intent.description: True iff the assertions would FAIL if the product regressed on the behaviour the test's title + called methods imply.

binds_oracle.description: True iff at least one assertion checks the Step-4 pinned expected value/element (not an incidental/unrelated assertion).

reasoning.description: One or two sentences justifying the verdict, citing the specific assertion/oracle.
